issues: The draft says Richmond was outshot 46-45 (i.e., Richmond took 45 shots), but the OCR says Richmond was outshot 46-45, meaning Humboldt took 46 shots and Richmond took 45 — the draft's phrasing 'both teams were closely matched in shots, 46-45' is slightly misleading but directionally consistent. However the bigger error is the draft omits Dave Tomlinson's goal entirely, attributing only two goals to Rutherford without naming the third Richmond scorer.
The draft states 'both teams were closely matched in shots, 46-45' — but the OCR clearly states Richmond was outshot 46-45, meaning Humboldt had the edge in shots, not a near-even match.
The draft omits Dave Tomlinson as Richmond's third goal scorer, a factual omission of a named Sockeyes player.
The draft omits Orland Kurtenbach's post-game comment about two key mistakes, which is Sockeyes-relevant context worth including.
review.correctedDescriptionShort: Mike Gaber's overtime goal gives Humboldt Broncos a 4-3 win over Richmond Sockeyes in Centennial Cup Game 6, forcing a deciding Game 7.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: Mike Gaber scored at 3:31 of overtime to give the Humboldt Broncos a 4-3 victory over the Richmond Sockeyes on April 29, forcing a seventh and deciding game in the Western Canada Centennial Cup final. Paul Rutherford scored twice and Dave Tomlinson added the other Richmond goal, while Bill McDougall led Humboldt with two goals and Bruce Hoffort made 42 saves as the Broncos outshot the Sockeyes 46-45. Richmond coach Orland Kurtenbach cited two key mistakes as the decisive factor in the loss.
review.notes: The headline is accurate per the OCR. Key fixes: Dave Tomlinson named as Richmond's third goal scorer (previously omitted); shot totals clarified to show Richmond was outshot 46-45 (not a near-even match); Kurtenbach's post-game comment included. Note: date of April 29 is consistent with the game being described as a Tuesday night, though the Centennial Cup final was played in May — this appears to be the Abbott Cup / Western Canada final series against Humboldt, not the Centennial Cup national final.
